commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e2b6b4841b73af6b759bc6b4207bbd120e89aa5c)
commands.review_summary:
The branch stacks the ordered core Doctor health contribution refactor with a config-audit scrub check that reports historical argv redaction gaps as structured lint findings and dry-run repair effects while preserving the legacy mutating scrub path.

PR surface: Source -14, Tests +591, Docs +2. Total +579 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the merge-risk path from source: doctor lint runs ordered contribution checks and returns nonzero for warning findings, while this PR maps historical config-audit scrub work to a warning. I did not run the CLI because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review is needed for the protected draft PR because the base stack is still open, real behavior proof is missing, and the warning-level lint/security posture is a product decision.

target.title: Doctor: expose config audit scrub findings
target.body:
## Summary

- Exposes historical config-audit argv redaction cleanup as structured doctor health findings.
- Adds dry-run repair effects for the planned audit-log scrub.
- Keeps the existing doctor:config-audit-scrub legacy run path as the only real mutating scrub path for normal doctor / doctor --fix.
- Declares the structured check inline on the existing ordered doctor contribution, so this PR does not add another core registry entry.

This is intentionally the small config-audit slice from the older doctor repair stack. It does not migrate cron, crontab handling, session state, or plugin-sensitive doctor rules.

## Stack

Stacked on #86627. The only new config-audit commit in this PR is `e2b6b4841b7`; the config-audit delta is 4 files.

## Current Head

Rebased and signed head: `e2b6b4841b7`.

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `node node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.ts src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.ts src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=dot --pool=forks --testTimeout=30000 --hookTimeout=30000` (2 files, 38 tests)
- 2026-06-03 refresh on signed head `e2b6b4841b7`: `git diff --check`; targeted `oxlint`; `pnpm exec vitest run --project commands src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.test.ts`; `pnpm exec vitest run --project commands src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts`; `pnpm exec vitest run --project unit src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts`.
- 2026-06-03 replayed onto fixed #86627 base; signed head `e2b6b4841b7`.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
